name: BoomTown API
description:
BoomTown uses the OAuth v2.0 protocol for authentication and authorization, and allows you to access to the API on behalf of a user without obtaining their password. Clients are issued a `client_id` and `client_secret`. All redirect URIs must be pre-registered. The following list are the various codes and how they are used to gain access to the APIs. *Authorization code*
  • Lifetime of 5 minutes
  • Used only once
*Access token*
  • Used as many times as desired within the lifetime of the token.
  • The token lifespan will be returned with the token object
*Refresh token*
  • Indefinite lifetime
  • Used to generate new access tokens
  • Store in secure persistent storage
  • This token should never be exposed on a client-side page or application
